perform the dressing changes. The HHA continues to see the patient for the wound care 
that is needed during the time that the family is not available and willing to provide the 
dressing changes. The wound care continues to be skilled nursing care, notwithstanding 
that the family provides it part of the time, and may be covered as long as the patient 
requires it.
